project.name: Vista del Sol ES — New Construction
project.street_pressure_psi_source: Water Pressure Flow Report (synthetic), SAR dated 2026-03-15

rooms.notes: Serves kindergarten wing and grades 1-2 wing; age band unclear from drawings
Extractor could not classify: STEAM (science/tech/engineering/art/math) lab vs. steam room
Low confidence: could be flexible classroom or community room

decision_points.subject: Classification — STEAM ROOM (B115)
decision_points.rationale: The dossier program could not classify "STEAM ROOM" — a human call, not a guess.

decision_points.subject: Classification — MULTI-USE ROOM (B116)
decision_points.rationale: Extractor mapped "MULTI-USE ROOM" to Multipurpose room at confidence 0.6 — below the 0.8 trust threshold.

decision_points.subject: Pressure regulating (PRV) station
decision_points.rationale: Street pressure 88 psi > 80 psi — Street pressure exceeds 80 psi — provide a PRV station: dual pilot-actuated regulating valves in parallel (consider a third small regulator for low-flow), with strainers.

citations.note: PRV when street pressure > 80 psi (dual pilot-actuated regulators, possibly a third small one); ≥25 psi required at the farthest/highest fixture.

decision_points.subject: LADWP Rule 16-D backflow compliance
decision_points.rationale: Water purveyor is LADWP — backflow prevention at the service must comply with LADWP Rule 16-D (meter protection: RP assemblies; dual parallel branches for uninterrupted domestic service).

citations.note: LADWP Rule 16-D; meter protection RP assemblies, dual parallel branches for domestic.

decision_points.subject: All-electric water heating
decision_points.rationale: Campus has no natural gas service — electric water heaters only (no gas, no heat-pump type): storage/tankless/instantaneous electric, ≤100 gal, high-recovery, in series with manifold; no multi-flue, no booster type. Gas subsystem rules are suppressed.

citations.note: All-electric water heating.
Electric water heaters only (no gas, no heat pump); ≤100 gal, high-recovery, in series w/ manifold; no multi-flue; no booster type.
